title: Sales Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the actual distribution or movement of a product or service to the customer. Coordinate sales distribution by establishing sales territories, quotas, and goals and establish training programs for sales representatives. Analyze sales statistics gathered by staff to determine sales potential and inventory requirements and monitor the preferences of customers.

tasks.text: Oversee regional and local sales managers and their staffs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Resolve customer complaints regarding sales and service.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor customer preferences to determine focus of sales efforts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with potential customers regarding equipment needs, and advise customers on types of equipment to purchase.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review operational records and reports to project sales and determine profitability.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Plan and direct staffing, training, and performance evaluations to develop and control sales and service programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate activities involving sales of manufactured products, services, commodities, real estate, or other subjects of sale.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine price schedules and discount rates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare budgets and approve budget expenditures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer or consult with department heads to plan advertising services and to secure information on equipment and customer specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Visit franchised dealers to stimulate interest in establishment or expansion of leasing programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent company at trade association meetings to promote products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise dealers and distributors on policies and operating procedures to ensure functional effectiveness of business.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct, coordinate, and review sales and service accounting and record-keeping, as well as receiving and shipping.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct clerical staff to keep records of export correspondence, bid requests, and credit collections, and to maintain current information on tariffs, licenses, and restrictions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess marketing potential of new and existing store locations, considering statistics and expenditures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct foreign sales and service outlets of an organization.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
